response.reasoning: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background from re:cinq (current role), Optilyz, and RIDE Capital. React experience confirmed at Optilyz. MongoDB and MySQL listed; PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned. Docker and Kubernetes experience present (GISCollective, Altom). AWS CDK experience from Optilyz. Java experience from Altom and robotic arms work, though dated. Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators — directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Strong TDD/testing culture evident (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, RIDE Capital craftsmanship). Nest.js not explicitly mentioned but Node.js/TypeScript foundation is solid. Vitest not mentioned but testing expertise is deep. Kotlin not mentioned, but Java is. MIT CS degree listed. Berlin-based, matching likely location. Communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React production experience
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work directly matches requirement
Deep testing/TDD culture with own frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts) and craftsmanship background
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (Altom 2016-2018)
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar and matches the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack with current, directly relevant AI-agent and MCP work. Gaps around specific frameworks (Nest.js, Vitest) and Kotlin are minor given the demonstrated polyglot adaptability, strong engineering fundamentals, and TDD discipline. A clear interview candidate.
